scenario: 🔥 You’re frying pakoras and suddenly the oil catches fire. What’s the right move?
B: Cover it with a metal lid and turn off the stove
C: Blow on it like it’s a birthday candle

feedback.A: ❌ Oil + water = firework show. 🎆 Not today!
feedback.B: ✅ Smother the flame, starve the fire. Chef + safety! 👨‍🍳
feedback.C: ❌ Unless your lungs have extinguisher mode, nope. 😂

scenario: 🌧️ You’re in a car and it starts flooding outside. What’s your genius play?
A: Open the door to check water level
B: Drive deeper to test your car’s swimming skills
C: Turn off the engine and climb to the roof
D: Text group chat ‘I might float away lol’

feedback.A: ❌ That water’s not here for a chat. 🌊
feedback.B: ❌ It’s a car, not a submarine.

scenario: 🧃 You feel dizzy and weak after skipping breakfast. What's smart?
B: Eat a balanced snack and rest
D: Challenge your body with a push-up

feedback.D: ❌ Gym time later, not when woozy. 🏋️‍♂️

scenario: 🚽 You find a cleaning chemical bottle without a label. What now?
A: Sniff it to guess what it is
B: Mix it with bleach and ‘see what happens’
C: Leave it alone and tell someone responsible
D: Use it anyway, what could go wrong?

feedback.A: ❌ Sherlock Nose is not a safe method. 🕵️‍♂️👃

scenario: 💧 Your little cousin is about to stick a fork into a toaster. What do you do?
A: Yell and scare them into freezing
B: Unplug the toaster and explain calmly
C: Let them learn the hard way

feedback.C: ❌ Not the time for natural consequences.

scenario: 🧨 You find an old box labeled ‘fireworks’ in your attic. What now?
A: Light one to see if it still works
B: Open and shake it to check the sound
C: Take it outside and call local authorities

scenario: 🌡️ Your friend has heatstroke symptoms after a trek. What’s wrong to do?
B: Give them ice cubes to eat fast
C: Move them to shade and cool them gradually
D: Fan them gently while loosening clothing

feedback.A: ✅ Not ideal, but better than nothing.

scenario: 🔌 Your laptop charger sparks when plugged in. What now?
B: Blow on the socket like a Nintendo cartridge
C: Unplug it and replace the charger
D: Ignore it. It still charges, right?

feedback.B: ❌ It’s not the 90s, nor a console. 😂
feedback.D: ❌ Until it explodes in your face. 💥

scenario: 🛁 You slip in the bathroom and bang your head. What’s the least helpful move?
B: Get up immediately and walk it off
C: Lie down and check for dizziness

scenario: ⚠️ You notice a strange burning smell in your room but no smoke. First move?
A: Ignore it, maybe it's your neighbor cooking
D: Light incense to mask the smell

feedback.B: ❌ Nose isn’t a sensor. Be smart.
